    Method
    Description
    static AcquisitionRun
    AcquisitionRun.readFrom(Hdf5Group parentGroup, String runName)
    Read a run from an existing HDF5 group.
    static FeatureFlags
    FeatureFlags.readFrom(Hdf5Group root)
    Read feature flags from an HDF5 root group.

    MSImage.readFrom(Hdf5Group studyGroup)
    Read an image cube from an HDF5 file.
    static SpectrumIndex
    SpectrumIndex.readFrom(Hdf5Group runGroup)
    Read spectrum index from an existing run group.
    void
    AcquisitionRun.writeTo(Hdf5Group parentGroup)
    Write this run to a parent group (creates / subgroup).
    void
    FeatureFlags.writeTo(Hdf5Group root)
    Write feature flags to an HDF5 root group.
    void
    MSImage.writeTo(Hdf5Group studyGroup)
    Write this image cube to an HDF5 study group.
    void
    SpectrumIndex.writeTo(Hdf5Group runGroup)
    Write this index to an HDF5 group (creates spectrum_index/ subgroup).
